matchups.description: RT / RB protection versus Q. Gillians is graded opponent advantage with high risk. Recommended response: chip with TE, RB scan help, boot away, quick game, screens, selective max-protection shots.

Interior offensive line versus D. Garner is graded slight opponent advantage with medium-high risk. Recommended response: double teams, combo blocks, run away from alignment, trap/wham, play action after successful doubles.
QB / TE / slot versus K. Witherspoon is graded rutgers opportunity with medium risk. Recommended response: RPO, play action, motion, TE option routes, high-low concepts.
